form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on April 17 over 425m at Bendigo behind Fluent Action, beaten 12 lengths (24.89). Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (28.55) at Bendigo over 500m. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy (22.50), beating Blues Train. Will find this a bit tougher, doesn't profile as a likely winner.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Star Fury beaten 5 lengths (22.41). Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (22.23) over 390m at Ballarat. Awkward draw to overcome. Cannot be ruled out.
